opinion.h4: ROBINSON ET AL. v. HUNTER ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF VIRGINIA. No. 5, Misc. Decided June 17, 1963.
opinion.p: L. W. Holt, Henry Halvor Jones and Simon Lawrence Cain for appellants.
Robert Y. Button, Attorney General of Virginia, and R. D. McIlwaine III, Assistant Attorney General, for appellees.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
374 U.S. 488 WALKER v. WALKER, WARDEN, ET AL. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE FIFTH CIRCUIT. No. 180, Misc. Decided June 17, 1963.
Certiorari granted; judgment vacated; and case remanded.
Jack P. F. Gremillion, Attorney General of Louisiana, and Scallan E. Walsh, Assistant Attorney General, for respondents.

The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis and the petition for writ of certiorari are granted. The judgment is vacated and the case is remanded for further consideration in light of Gideon v. Wainwright, 372 U.S. 335.
